How It WorksKaise Kaam Karta Hai

Step-by-Step GuideQadam Ba Qadam Guide

One-time setup. Authorize once, post 10 times, withdraw. No verification documents, no investment. Ek baar setup. Ek baar authorize, 10 baar post, withdrawal. Koi documents nahi, koi investment nahi.

1

Join the Temu Influencer ProgramTemu Influencer Program Join Karein

Click the join button. Free to register. Any TikTok account from any country works — monetization is not required.Join button pe click karein. Register karna bilkul free hai. Kisi bhi country ka TikTok account chalega — monetization zaroori nahi.

2

Authorize Your Biggest TikTok AccountApna Sabse Bada TikTok Account Authorize Karein

Most important step. Use your highest-follower account on your original IP. Do not create multiple or fake accounts. One quality account — done once.Yeh sabse zaroori qadam hai. Sabse zyada followers wala account original IP pe use karein. Multiple ya fake accounts mat banayein. Ek achi account — ek baar kaam.

3

Create & Post ContentContent Banayein aur Post Karein

Use short-form video. Source from YouTube/Instagram or make your own. Add your Temu benefit code. Submit each post for approval in the Temu dashboard.Short-form video use karein. YouTube/Instagram se lein ya khud banayein. Apna Temu benefit code add karein. Har post Temu dashboard mein submit karein approval ke liye.

4

Earn Cash Per Approved PostHar Approved Post Pe Cash Kamaein

Each approved post adds to your balance instantly. Level 1 earns $2/post, Level 7 earns $80/post. No verification needed.Har approved post turant balance mein add hoti hai. Level 1: $2/post, Level 7: $80/post. Koi verification nahi.

5

Withdraw to PayPalPayPal Pe Withdrawal Karein

Add phone number, connect PayPal, withdraw. Payments can process within hours. No complex verification — just your number and PayPal email.Phone number add karein, PayPal connect karein, withdrawal lo. Payment kuch ghanton mein aa sakti hai. Bas number aur PayPal email chahiye.

Start With Your Biggest Account Apne Sabse Bade Account Se Shuru Karein

Higher followers = higher level = higher earnings. Same effort at every level. Join free, authorize once, post 10 times, withdraw. Zyada followers = bada level = zyada kamai. Har level pe mehnat same. Free join, ek baar authorize, 10 posts, withdrawal.
